name: sales ops manager for a marketing agency processing 10-20 closed deals/month tool
description: For sales ops managers in marketing agencies processing 10-20 closed deals/month, manual calculations cause delayed payouts. We automate commission calculations instead of manual spreadsheets and calculations.

problem_solved: Manual calculation of sales commissions leads to errors and delays in payouts.
features: simple input form for closed deals
